cases.query: SELECT * FROM docs LIMIT 5
SELECT * FROM docs WHERE category = 'tech' AND MATCH (d:Doc)-[:REL]->(x) LIMIT 10
MATCH (d:Doc) RETURN d LIMIT 1
SELEC * FROM docs
SELECT * docs
SELECT * FROM docs AS d
SELECT d.name, t.tag FROM docs AS d JOIN tags AS t ON d.id = t.doc_id
SELECT e.name, m.name FROM employees AS e JOIN employees AS m ON e.manager_id = m.id
SELECT * FROM docs JOIN tags AS t ON docs.id = t.doc_id
SELECT e.name, m.name, d.name FROM employees AS e JOIN employees AS m ON e.manager_id = m.id JOIN employees AS d ON m.manager_id = d.id
TRAIN QUANTIZER ON my_collection WITH (m=8, k=256)
TRAIN QUANTIZER ON docs WITH (m=8)
TRAIN QUANTIZER ON vectors WITH (m=16, k=256, type=opq)
TRAIN QUANTIZER ON my_coll WITH (m=8, k=256, oversampling=4, force=true)
TRAIN QUANTIZER ON data WITH (m=8, type=rabitq)
TRAIN QUANTIZER ON my_collection WITH (m=8, k=256);
TRAIN my_collection WITH (m=8)
TRAIN QUANTIZER my_collection WITH (m=8)
TRAIN QUANTIZER ON WITH (m=8)
TRAIN QUANTIZER ON my_collection
SELECT * FROM t WHERE vector SPARSE_NEAR $sv LIMIT 5
SELECT * FROM t WHERE vector SPARSE_NEAR {1: 0.5, 2: 0.3} LIMIT 5
SELECT * FROM t WHERE vector SPARSE_NEAR $sv USING 'idx' LIMIT 5
SELECT * FROM t WHERE vector NEAR $v AND vector SPARSE_NEAR $sv LIMIT 5
SELECT * FROM t WHERE vector SPARSE_NEAR LIMIT 5
SELECT * FROM t WHERE vector SPARSE_NEAR {} LIMIT 5
SELECT similarity() AS score FROM t WHERE vector NEAR $v LIMIT 10
SELECT similarity() FROM t WHERE vector NEAR $v LIMIT 10
SELECT ctx.* FROM t AS ctx WHERE vector NEAR $v LIMIT 10
SELECT title, similarity() AS relevance FROM t WHERE vector NEAR $v LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM t WHERE vector NEAR $v ORDER BY similarity() LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM t WHERE vector NEAR $v ORDER BY similarity() ASC LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM t WHERE vector NEAR $v ORDER BY similarity() DESC, created_at ASC LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM docs WHERE name = 'O''Brien'
SELECT * FROM docs WHERE name = 'It''s a ''test'''
SELECT * FROM docs WHERE name = ''
SELECT * FROM docs WHERE vector NEAR [1, 2, 3] LIMIT 5
SELECT * FROM docs WHERE vector NEAR [1, 0.5, 2] LIMIT 5
SELECT * FROM docs WHERE category NOT IN ('draft', 'deleted')
SELECT * FROM docs WHERE id NOT IN (1, 2, 3)
SELECT * FROM a UNION SELECT * FROM b UNION SELECT * FROM c
SELECT * FROM a UNION SELECT * FROM b INTERSECT SELECT * FROM c
SELECT * FROM docs WHERE vector NEAR_FUSED [$v1, $v2] LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM docs WHERE vector NEAR_FUSED [$v1, $v2] USING FUSION 'rrf' (k=60) LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM docs WHERE vector NEAR_FUSED [$v1] LIMIT 10
